lessons.title: The Linux Filesystem Tree
lessons.description: Understand the hierarchical structure that organizes every file and folder in Linux.

lessons.title: Where Am I? The `pwd` Command
lessons.description: Never get lost again. Learn the command that tells you exactly where you are in the tree.

lessons.title: What's Here? The `ls` Command
lessons.description: List the contents of directories. Your eyes in the dark.

lessons.title: Changing Directories: `cd`
lessons.description: Master the art of moving through the filesystem using absolute and relative paths.

lessons.title: Hidden Treasures & Shortcuts
lessons.description: Discover dotfiles, the home shortcut `~`, and the mysterious `.` and `..` directories.
